stages.name: results_hygiene

major: Re-drawn UI chrome — fake browser bar (lines 20-26, 61-69)
Mid-render token improvisation — 18 inline hex values, no CSS custom properties (lines 7-46)
Centred everything — no lateral bias on any section (lines 13, 27, 32, 36)
Contrast failure — white text on #a78bfa in CTA band approx 2:1 (lines 37-40, 84-87)
minor: Startup-cliché copy — seamless, supercharges, cutting-edge, blazing-fast (lines 59, 79-81)
Tabular data without tabular-nums — stats section (lines 27-29)
Prose max-width in px not ch — .hero p max-width: 600px ≈ 83ch (line 17)
